Footer.description: A professional network for Russian-speaking women in the Seattle area. We focus on knowledge sharing, building community, and career development across all industries.

About.title: About Us
About.description: Learn about WorkChatSeattle - a professional network for Russian-speaking women in the Seattle area.
About.heroSubtitle: We are a professional network for Russian-speaking women in the Seattle area, dedicated to fostering career growth, building meaningful connections, and creating a supportive community.
About.missionDesc1: WorkChatSeattle was founded with a simple yet powerful mission: to create a space where Russian-speaking women in the Seattle area can connect, learn, and grow together professionally.
About.missionDesc2: We understand that navigating a career in a new country comes with unique challenges. Language barriers, cultural differences, and the need to rebuild professional networks can make the journey feel isolating. That's why we created this community - to ensure no one has to face these challenges alone.
About.missionDesc3: Our members come from all walks of life - from tech professionals and healthcare workers to entrepreneurs and creatives. What unites us is our shared experiences and our commitment to lifting each other up.
About.whatWeDoItem1Desc: Virtual and in-person events on career development, leadership, and professional skills
About.whatWeDoItem2Desc: Match members with experienced professionals across various industries
About.whatWeDoItem3Desc: Create opportunities both online and in-person to build lasting connections
About.whatWeDoItem4Desc: Job searching tips, resume reviews, and interview preparation support
About.valuesSubtitle: The principles that guide everything we do
About.valuesCommunityDesc: We believe in the power of connection. Our community brings together women from diverse backgrounds and industries to support each other's growth.
About.valuesKnowledgeDesc: Learning never stops. We create opportunities for members to share their expertise and learn from one another through events and mentorship.
About.valuesSupportDesc: We understand the unique challenges women face in their careers. Our network provides a safe space for honest conversations and mutual support.
About.valuesGrowthDesc: We are committed to helping every member achieve their professional goals, whether that's landing a new job, switching careers, or advancing in their field.
About.seattleDesc: Our community is rooted in the vibrant Seattle area, home to a thriving tech industry, diverse cultures, and endless opportunities for professional growth.
About.joinDesc: Whether you're just starting your career journey or are an experienced professional looking to give back, there's a place for you in WorkChatSeattle.

Events.upcomingDesc: Join us for virtual and in-person events focused on career growth, professional development, and community building.
Events.noUpcomingDesc: Check back soon for new events, or browse our past events to watch recordings.
Events.pastDesc: Missed an event? Watch recordings from our past sessions on career development, professional growth, and more.
Events.noPastDesc: Check out our upcoming events to join the community.
Events.shareDesc: Know someone who might be interested? Share this event with your network.

Mentors.title: Find a Mentor
Mentors.desc: Connect with experienced professionals who can guide your career journey. Our mentors come from diverse industries and backgrounds.
Mentors.noMentorsEmpty: Be the first to register as a mentor!
Mentors.contactDesc: Reach out to {name} to start a conversation about mentorship.

Contact.title: Contact Us
Contact.heroDesc: Have questions or want to get involved? We'd love to hear from you. Reach out through any of the channels below.
Contact.faq1Answer: The easiest way to join is through our Facebook group. Simply click the link above and request to join. We review requests regularly and will approve your membership shortly.
Contact.faq2Question: Do I need to speak Russian to join?
Contact.faq2Answer: While our community primarily consists of Russian-speaking women, we welcome anyone who identifies with our mission of supporting women's professional growth in the Seattle area.
Contact.faq3Question: How can I become a mentor?
Contact.faq3Answer: If you're an experienced professional willing to share your knowledge, you can register as a mentor through our website. We'll review your profile and match you with mentees seeking guidance in your area of expertise.
Contact.faq4Question: Are the events free to attend?
Contact.faq4Answer: Most of our events are free for community members. Some special workshops or in-person events may have a small fee to cover costs. Event details always include pricing information.
Contact.ctaDesc: Join our growing community of professional women supporting each other in their career journeys.
